# CalendarPlus

## Tags
date, day, month, year, event, add, subscribe, create, new

## Categories
time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/calendar-plus)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CalendarPlus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CalendarPlus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
